Influencer Outreach Strategy

Ideal Influencer Profile

Micro Vs Macro: Micro-influencers (10K-100K followers) are prioritized due to lean budget, higher engagement, and niche audience alignment. Macro-influencers considered for broader awareness if specific budget allows.

Specific Niches

  • Travel (destination guides, unique local experiences, solo/couples travel)
  • Lifestyle (daily routines, hobbies, luxury, digital nomad, personal growth)
  • Food & Drink (restaurant/bar reviews, culinary experiences, cooking classes)
  • Wellness (yoga, meditation, spa, retreats, healthy living)
  • Adventure/Outdoor (hiking, extreme sports, unique outdoor activities)
  • Culture/Arts (museums, historical tours, local traditions, festivals, galleries)
  • Nightlife/Events (concerts, club reviews, festival guides, unique evening experiences)
  • Cinema/Entertainment (film reviews, movie-themed experiences, local cinema events)
  • Private/Luxury Experiences (exclusive tours, bespoke services, high-end travel)

Audience Overlap: Influencers whose audience aligns with both ‘Travelers’ (seeking experiences) and ‘Companions’ (offering/sharing experiences) or who can speak to both sides of the platform.

Value Hooks

  • Monetary Compensation: Competitive rates, flat fees, or commission-based structures.
  • Exclusive Access: Early access to premium Tirak features, unique experiences, or new destinations.
  • Audience Relevance: High-quality, engaging content opportunities directly relevant to their audience’s interests in travel and unique experiences.
  • Content Creation Opportunities: Tirak provides a rich source of authentic, local, and diverse experiences for compelling content.
  • Brand Enhancement: Position as a curator of unique experiences and a leader in authentic travel/local engagement.
  • Partnership Potential: Opportunity for long-term collaboration and ambassadorship with a growing platform.

Channel Adaptation

Dm Strategy

Description: Concise, personalized, and direct. Start with specific content praise, introduce Tirak briefly, state the value, and drive to email for details. Use emojis appropriately.

Length Guideline: 2-4 sentences.

Email Strategy

Description: Professional, detailed, and structured. Clear subject line, comprehensive introduction to Tirak, specific partnership details, compensation, and clear CTA for a call or dedicated link.

Length Guideline: 150-250 words.

Follow Up Sequence

Step: Initial Outreach

Type: DM/Email

Description: First contact, introduces Tirak, outlines the opportunity, and highlights the value hook. Personalized and direct.

Step: Bump/Reminder

Type: DM/Email

Delay: 3-5 business days

Description: Gentle follow-up. Reiterate value, perhaps add a new angle or urgency, or simply ask if they received the initial message.

Step: Final Attempt

Type: DM/Email

Delay: 5-7 business days after bump

Description: Last push. Polite, acknowledges busy schedule, offers a clear ‘no pressure’ out, but leaves the door open for future collaboration.

Dm Scripts

Traveler Persona

Culture

Initial: Hi [Influencer Name]! Loved your recent post on [specific cultural event/museum]. Your eye for local culture is amazing! We’re Tirak, a platform connecting travelers with authentic local experiences. We think your audience would love the unique cultural tours we offer. Would you be open to a quick chat via email to explore a partnership? ✨

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], just wanted to follow up on my message about Tirak. We genuinely believe your followers would connect with our unique cultural experiences. Let me know if you’re interested in learning more via email! 😊

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], one last note about Tirak. We’re still keen to explore a partnership for cultural experiences if you’re ever interested. No pressure at all, but the opportunity remains open! Best!

Adventure

Initial: Hey [Influencer Name]! Your [specific adventure activity] reel was epic! So much energy. We’re Tirak, an app for finding incredible local adventures. We see a perfect fit for your adventurous audience. Interested in partnering up? Let’s connect via email! 🚀

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], following up on Tirak! We have some truly unique local adventures we think your audience would go wild for. Would love to send over some details via email if you’re curious! 🏞️

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], just one more message about Tirak’s adventure experiences. If you ever have a moment and are looking for new content ideas, we’d love to chat. No worries if not! Wishing you more amazing adventures!

Wellness

Initial: Hi [Influencer Name]! Your recent [wellness activity/retreat] content was so inspiring and calming. We’re Tirak, connecting people with unique local wellness experiences – from yoga to spa days. We think your audience would truly appreciate this. Want to chat more via email? 🧘‍♀️

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], wanted to circle back about Tirak. Your focus on holistic well-being aligns perfectly with our unique local wellness offerings. Let me know if you’d like more info via email! 🌿

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], last follow-up regarding Tirak and our wellness experiences. If you’re ever exploring new brand partnerships for your mindful audience, we’d love to connect. Wishing you peace and good health!

Nightlife

Initial: What’s up [Influencer Name]! Your [specific bar/club/event] review was spot on – you really know the best spots! We’re Tirak, helping travelers discover the coolest local nightlife and events. We think your followers would eat this up! Fancy a quick email chat? 🌃

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], following up on Tirak! We’re all about uncovering hidden gems in nightlife and events, and we think you’re the perfect person to share them with your audience. Drop me an email if you’re interested! 🥂

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], one final message about Tirak. If you’re ever looking for fresh nightlife content or unique event access, we’re here. No pressure, just wanted to ensure you saw it! Keep rocking the night scene!

Lifestyle

Initial: Hi [Influencer Name]! Absolutely love your [specific lifestyle post/vlog] – your aesthetic is impeccable! We’re Tirak, a platform for curated local lifestyle experiences, from unique workshops to bespoke tours. We feel your audience would adore these. Let’s talk partnership via email? ✨

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], wanted to follow up on Tirak! Your lifestyle content is all about unique experiences, and that’s exactly what we offer. We’d love to discuss how we can partner up. Email me if you’re keen! 🏡

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], last message about Tirak and lifestyle experiences. If you’re ever seeking new, elevated experiences to share, we’d be thrilled to collaborate. No obligations, just an open invitation!

Private

Initial: Hello [Influencer Name]! Your recent [luxury/exclusive experience] post was stunning – you truly capture the essence of bespoke travel. We’re Tirak, offering exclusive private experiences for discerning travelers. We see a perfect synergy with your brand. Shall we discuss details via email? 💎

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], just circling back on Tirak. Our platform features unique private and luxury experiences that we believe would resonate strongly with your sophisticated audience. Let me know if an email chat works! 🥂

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], final follow-up on Tirak. If you’re ever seeking exclusive, private experiences to showcase, we’d love to be your partner. No pressure, just wanted to ensure you received our offer for collaboration.

Cinema

Initial: Hey [Influencer Name]! Your take on [specific film/series] was brilliant! You have such a unique perspective. We’re Tirak, connecting film lovers with unique cinema-themed experiences and local screenings. We think your audience would be fascinated! Interested in an email chat? 🎬

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], following up on Tirak! We offer some really cool cinema and entertainment experiences that we think your film-loving audience would enjoy. Let me know if you’d like to hear more via email! 🍿

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], one last message about Tirak’s cinema experiences. If you’re ever looking for unique film-related content or access, we’d love to connect. Keep up the amazing reviews!

Events

Initial: Hi [Influencer Name]! Your coverage of [specific local event/festival] was fantastic – you capture the vibe perfectly! We’re Tirak, a platform for discovering and booking unique local events. We think your audience would love this resource. Shall we chat partnership via email? 🎉

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], circling back on Tirak! We’re building a hub for amazing local events, and we think your knack for finding the best ones would make for a great partnership. Let me know if you’d like more info via email! 🗓️

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], final message about Tirak’s event experiences. If you’re ever seeking new events to cover or exclusive access, we’d be happy to collaborate. Keep showcasing those awesome local happenings!

Food Drink

Initial: Hey [Influencer Name]! Your [specific restaurant/dish] review made my mouth water! You find the best food spots. We’re Tirak, connecting foodies with authentic local culinary experiences and hidden gems. Your audience needs this! Email for details? 🍽️

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], following up on Tirak! We specialize in unique local food & drink experiences – from street food tours to bespoke cooking classes. We think your audience would love this. Let me know if an email chat works! 🍜

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], last message about Tirak’s food & drink experiences. If you’re ever seeking new culinary adventures or local recommendations, we’d be thrilled to partner. Keep sharing those delicious finds!

Companion Persona

Culture

Initial: Hi [Influencer Name]! Your passion for [specific cultural aspect] really shines in your content. We’re Tirak, a platform where locals like you can share their expertise by offering unique cultural experiences to travelers. We think you’d be an amazing Companion! Interested in learning how to earn with us? Email us! 🌍

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], following up on Tirak! Imagine sharing your deep cultural knowledge and earning from it. Our platform makes it easy. Let me know if you’re curious about becoming a Tirak Companion via email! 🎨

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], one last note about Tirak. If you’re looking for a way to share your cultural passion and monetize it, our Companion program is for you. No pressure, just wanted to ensure you saw the opportunity!

Adventure

Initial: Hey [Influencer Name]! Your [specific adventure skill/location] content is so inspiring! We’re Tirak, a platform empowering adventurers like you to guide travelers on unique local experiences. We’d love to have you as a Companion! Ready to turn your passion into profit? Email us! 🏞️

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], circling back on Tirak! Your expertise in adventure could be a fantastic income stream as a Tirak Companion. We’d love to share how. Email me if you’re interested! 🧗‍♀️

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], final message about Tirak. If you’re seeking to share your adventure skills and earn, our Companion program is a great fit. No worries if not, but the opportunity is there!

Wellness

Initial: Hi [Influencer Name]! Your commitment to [specific wellness practice] is truly admirable. We’re Tirak, a platform where wellness experts like you can offer unique experiences (yoga, meditation, retreats) to travelers. Think you’d be a great Companion! Want to learn more via email? 🌸

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], wanted to follow up about Tirak. Your wellness expertise is valuable! Imagine guiding others through mindful experiences and earning. Let me know if you’re interested in becoming a Companion via email! 🧘

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], last follow-up regarding Tirak. If you’re looking to expand your reach and offer unique wellness experiences as a Companion, we’d love to connect. Wishing you well!

Nightlife

Initial: What’s up [Influencer Name]! Your knack for finding the best [specific nightlife spot/event] is unmatched! We’re Tirak, a platform where local experts like you can guide travelers through the city’s best nightlife. Become a Companion and earn! Ready to chat via email? 🕺

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], following up on Tirak! Your nightlife insights are perfect for guiding travelers. Earn by sharing your expertise as a Tirak Companion. Email me if you’re keen to learn more! 🍻

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], one final message about Tirak. If you’re looking to monetize your nightlife knowledge and show travelers a great time, our Companion program is open. No pressure!

Lifestyle

Initial: Hi [Influencer Name]! Your unique [specific lifestyle hobby/skill] content is so engaging! We’re Tirak, a platform for individuals like you to offer curated lifestyle experiences (workshops, city tours) to travelers. We think you’d be an amazing Companion! Email for details? ☕

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], wanted to follow up on Tirak! Your unique lifestyle skills could be a fantastic way to earn by becoming a Companion and sharing them with curious travelers. Let me know if an email chat works! 🛍️

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], last message about Tirak. If you’re ever seeking to share your unique lifestyle skills and earn from it as a Companion, we’d be thrilled to collaborate. No obligations!

Private

Initial: Hello [Influencer Name]! Your sophisticated taste for [specific luxury item/experience] is evident. We’re Tirak, a platform for experts to offer exclusive, private experiences to discerning travelers. We believe your refined expertise would make you an exceptional Companion! Email for a discreet chat? 🗝️

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], just circling back on Tirak. Your expertise in luxury and exclusive experiences could be highly sought after by travelers. Learn how to become a private Companion with us. Email me! 🥂

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], final follow-up on Tirak. If you’re interested in offering bespoke private experiences and earning, our Companion program is ideal. No pressure, just wanted to ensure you saw it.

Cinema

Initial: Hey [Influencer Name]! Your deep dive into [specific film genre/local cinema] is fascinating! We’re Tirak, a platform for film buffs like you to guide travelers through unique cinema experiences, local film history, or themed tours. Become a Companion and share your passion! Email us? 🎞️

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], following up on Tirak! Your passion for cinema could be a unique offering for travelers as a Companion. Imagine guiding film tours! Let me know if you’re interested via email! 📽️

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], one last message about Tirak. If you’re looking to share your film knowledge and earn as a Companion, we’d love to hear from you. Keep the great content coming!

Events

Initial: Hi [Influencer Name]! Your ability to highlight the best [specific local event/festival] is incredible! We’re Tirak, a platform where local experts like you can guide travelers through unique events and festivals. Become a Companion and earn! Ready to chat via email? 🎟️

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], circling back on Tirak! Your event expertise is perfect for guiding travelers to the best local happenings. Earn by becoming a Companion! Let me know if an email chat works! 🥳

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], final message about Tirak. If you’re seeking to share your event knowledge and earn as a Companion, we’re here. No obligations, just an open invitation!

Food Drink

Initial: Hey [Influencer Name]! Your culinary explorations of [specific cuisine/local eatery] are fantastic! We’re Tirak, a platform where foodies like you can guide travelers on unique food & drink tours or cooking experiences. Become a Companion and earn! Email for details? 🍕

Bump: Hey [Influencer Name], following up on Tirak! Your food expertise is perfect for guiding hungry travelers. Earn by sharing your favorite local spots as a Companion. Let me know if you’re interested via email! 🍷

Final: Hi [Influencer Name], last message about Tirak. If you’re looking to share your passion for food & drink and earn as a Companion, we’d love to chat. Keep discovering those delicious places!

Email Pitches

Traveler Persona

Culture

Initial: Subject: Partnership Opportunity: Share Authentic Cultural Experiences with [Influencer Name] & Tirak!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’ve been a huge admirer of your work, particularly your insightful exploration of [specific cultural event/museum/topic] in your recent content. Your ability to connect with and convey the essence of local culture is truly captivating, and your audience clearly values your authentic perspective.

At Tirak, our mission is to connect travelers with unique, authentic local experiences across the globe. We believe your audience, who trusts your recommendations for enriching cultural journeys, would be incredibly excited about the diverse range of cultural tours, workshops, and immersive experiences available on our platform.

We’re looking to partner with influential voices like yours to introduce Tirak to a wider audience. We envision a collaboration where you could showcase Tirak’s unique cultural offerings, creating compelling content that resonates deeply with your followers. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., a sponsored post, affiliate commission, free access to experiences] and provide fresh, engaging content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to discuss this further? Please let me know what time works best for you, or if you’d prefer to receive our media kit for more details.

Looking forward to hearing from you, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: A Unique Cultural Partnership with Tirak for [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to gently follow up on my previous email regarding a potential partnership between you and Tirak. I understand how busy your schedule can be, but I genuinely believe this collaboration presents a fantastic opportunity to further enrich your cultural content and offer immense value to your engaged audience.

Imagine showcasing unique local cultural festivals, hidden historical tours, or immersive art workshops through Tirak – content perfectly aligned with your brand and audience’s interests. We’re confident that our platform’s focus on authentic cultural immersion would deeply resonate with your followers, providing them with unparalleled travel experiences.

We’re eager to explore how we can tailor a partnership that best suits your content style and audience. Would you be available for a quick chat sometime this week? Alternatively, I’m happy to provide more specific examples of cultural experiences on Tirak that we feel would be a perfect fit for your platform.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak & Cultural Experiences - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

This is a final follow-up regarding our invitation to partner with Tirak on showcasing unique cultural experiences. We truly admire your work and still believe there’s a strong synergy between your content and our platform’s offerings.

We understand if this isn’t the right time, and there’s absolutely no pressure. However, we wanted to ensure you received our offer. Should your priorities shift or if you’re ever looking for new, authentic cultural content opportunities, please don’t hesitate to reach out. The door for collaboration remains open.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Adventure

Initial: Subject: Thrilling Partnership: [Influencer Name] & Tirak for Adventure Seekers!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’m consistently captivated by your incredible adventure content, especially your recent [specific adventure activity/destination] exploration. Your ability to inspire and guide fellow thrill-seekers is truly remarkable, and your audience clearly trusts your adventurous spirit.

Tirak is a platform dedicated to connecting travelers with unique, local adventure experiences, from hidden hiking trails to extreme sports with local experts. We believe your highly engaged audience, who craves genuine adventure, would be incredibly excited about the diverse range of adrenaline-pumping and off-the-beaten-path experiences available on our platform.

We’re actively seeking influential voices like yours to showcase Tirak’s unparalleled adventure offerings. We envision a collaboration where you could document your experiences using Tirak, creating exhilarating content that deeply resonates with your followers. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, free adventure experiences, affiliate commission] and provide fresh, engaging content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to explore how we can tailor this partnership? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our partnership deck for more details.

Looking forward to connecting, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: Adventure Awaits with Tirak & [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to follow up on my previous email about a potential partnership between you and Tirak. I’m keen to explore how we can help you deliver even more incredible adventure content to your audience.

Imagine showcasing unique local paragliding, hidden canyoning spots, or guided wilderness treks through Tirak – content that perfectly aligns with your brand and inspires your followers to explore. Our platform is designed to provide authentic, thrilling experiences that your audience is actively seeking.

We’re ready to discuss a tailored collaboration that provides mutual benefit. Would you be available for a quick chat sometime this week? I can also send over some specific adventure experience examples on Tirak that we believe would be a perfect fit for your content.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak & Adventure Experiences - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

This is a final follow-up regarding our invitation to partner with Tirak on showcasing unique adventure experiences. We truly admire your passion for exploration and still believe there’s a strong synergy between your content and our platform’s offerings.

We understand if this isn’t the right time, and there’s absolutely no pressure. However, we wanted to ensure you received our offer. Should your priorities shift or if you’re ever looking for new, authentic adventure content opportunities, please don’t hesitate to reach out. The door for collaboration remains open.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Wellness

Initial: Subject: Nurture & Grow: Partner with Tirak on Unique Wellness Journeys, [Influencer Name]!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’ve been deeply impressed by your commitment to [specific wellness practice/philosophy] and the mindful community you’ve built. Your ability to inspire holistic well-being is truly impactful, and your audience clearly trusts your guidance.

Tirak is a platform dedicated to connecting travelers with unique, local wellness experiences – from serene meditation retreats and bespoke spa days to local yoga classes and nature-based therapies. We believe your audience, who values genuine paths to rejuvenation, would be incredibly enthusiastic about the diverse range of mindful experiences available on our platform.

We’re looking to partner with influential voices like yours to introduce Tirak’s wellness offerings. We envision a collaboration where you could highlight Tirak’s unique experiences, creating calming and inspiring content that resonates deeply with your followers. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, free access to wellness experiences, affiliate commission] and provide fresh, engaging content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to explore how we can tailor this partnership? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our partnership deck for more details.

Looking forward to fostering well-being together, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: Wellness Discovery with Tirak & [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to gently follow up on my previous email regarding a potential partnership between you and Tirak. I truly feel this collaboration presents a fantastic opportunity to further enrich your wellness content and offer immense value to your engaged audience.

Imagine showcasing unique local sound baths, forest bathing experiences, or personalized mindfulness workshops through Tirak – content perfectly aligned with your brand and your followers’ pursuit of peace and balance. Our platform is designed to provide authentic, rejuvenating experiences that your audience will appreciate.

We’re eager to explore how we can tailor a partnership that best suits your content style and audience. Would you be available for a quick chat sometime this week? I’m also happy to provide more specific examples of wellness experiences on Tirak that we believe would be a perfect fit for your platform.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak & Wellness Experiences - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

This is a final follow-up regarding our invitation to partner with Tirak on showcasing unique wellness experiences. We truly admire your dedication to promoting health and well-being, and still believe there’s a strong synergy between your content and our platform’s offerings.

We understand if this isn’t the right time, and there’s absolutely no pressure. However, we wanted to ensure you received our offer. Should your priorities shift or if you’re ever looking for new, authentic wellness content opportunities, please don’t hesitate to reach out. The door for collaboration remains open.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Nightlife

Initial: Subject: Ignite the Night: Partner with Tirak for Epic Nightlife, [Influencer Name]!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’m consistently impressed by your vibrant nightlife content, especially your recent [specific bar/club/event] review. Your ability to uncover the hottest spots and capture the energy of the night is truly infectious, and your audience clearly trusts your recommendations.

Tirak is a platform dedicated to connecting travelers with the most unique and exciting local nightlife and event experiences, from hidden speakeasies to exclusive parties and live music venues. We believe your highly engaged audience, who loves to discover the best of the night, would be incredibly excited about the diverse range of offerings available on our platform.

We’re actively seeking influential voices like yours to showcase Tirak’s unparalleled nightlife experiences. We envision a collaboration where you could document your adventures using Tirak, creating exhilarating content that deeply resonates with your followers. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, free access to events, affiliate commission] and provide fresh, engaging content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to explore how we can tailor this partnership? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our partnership deck for more details.

Looking forward to lighting up the night together, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: Discovering Local Nightlife with Tirak & [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to follow up on my previous email about a potential partnership between you and Tirak. I’m keen to explore how we can help you deliver even more incredible nightlife content to your audience.

Imagine showcasing unique local bar crawls, exclusive rooftop parties, or underground music scenes through Tirak – content that perfectly aligns with your brand and inspires your followers to explore the night. Our platform is designed to provide authentic, thrilling experiences that your audience is actively seeking.

We’re ready to discuss a tailored collaboration that provides mutual benefit. Would you be available for a quick chat sometime this week? I can also send over some specific nightlife experience examples on Tirak that we believe would be a perfect fit for your content.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak & Nightlife Experiences - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

This is a final follow-up regarding our invitation to partner with Tirak on showcasing unique nightlife experiences. We truly admire your passion for uncovering the best of the night, and still believe there’s a strong synergy between your content and our platform’s offerings.

We understand if this isn’t the right time, and there’s absolutely no pressure. However, we wanted to ensure you received our offer. Should your priorities shift or if you’re ever looking for new, authentic nightlife content opportunities, please don’t hesitate to reach out. The door for collaboration remains open.

Sincerely, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Lifestyle

Initial: Subject: Elevate Your Lifestyle Content: Partner with Tirak, [Influencer Name]!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’ve been a long-time admirer of your exquisite lifestyle content, particularly your ability to curate and share [specific lifestyle activity/aesthetic] with such grace. Your discerning eye for quality experiences is truly inspiring, and your audience clearly looks to you for elevated living.

Tirak is a platform dedicated to connecting travelers with unique, curated local lifestyle experiences – from bespoke workshops and artisan craft classes to personalized city explorations and luxury shopping tours. We believe your audience, who seeks sophisticated and authentic ways to enhance their lives, would be incredibly excited about the diverse range of offerings available on our platform.

We’re looking to partner with influential voices like yours to introduce Tirak’s lifestyle offerings. We envision a collaboration where you could highlight Tirak’s unique experiences, creating elegant and engaging content that resonates deeply with your followers. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, free access to exclusive experiences, affiliate commission] and provide fresh, compelling content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to explore how we can tailor this partnership? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our partnership deck for more details.

Looking forward to enhancing lifestyles together, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: Curated Lifestyle Experiences with Tirak & [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to gently follow up on my previous email regarding a potential partnership between you and Tirak. I truly feel this collaboration presents a fantastic opportunity to further enrich your lifestyle content and offer immense value to your sophisticated audience.

Imagine showcasing unique local fashion tours, gourmet cooking classes, or personalized wellness retreats through Tirak – content perfectly aligned with your brand and your followers’ pursuit of an elevated lifestyle. Our platform is designed to provide authentic, high-quality experiences that your audience is actively seeking.

We’re eager to explore how we can tailor a partnership that best suits your content style and audience. Would you be available for a quick chat sometime this week? I’m also happy to provide more specific examples of lifestyle experiences on Tirak that we believe would be a perfect fit for your platform.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak & Lifestyle Experiences - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

This is a final follow-up regarding our invitation to partner with Tirak on showcasing unique lifestyle experiences. We truly admire your dedication to curating beautiful and meaningful content, and still believe there’s a strong synergy between your brand and our platform’s offerings.

We understand if this isn’t the right time, and there’s absolutely no pressure. However, we wanted to ensure you received our offer. Should your priorities shift or if you’re ever looking for new, authentic lifestyle content opportunities, please don’t hesitate to reach out. The door for collaboration remains open.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Private

Initial: Subject: Exclusive Partnership: Showcase Private Experiences with Tirak, [Influencer Name]!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’ve been incredibly impressed by your ability to highlight unique and exclusive experiences, particularly your recent feature on [specific luxury/private event]. Your audience clearly trusts your refined taste for the most bespoke and intimate journeys.

Tirak is a premium platform dedicated to connecting discerning travelers with exclusive private experiences – from bespoke tours and luxury transfers to private chef dinners and intimate cultural immersions. We believe your sophisticated audience, who values privacy and unparalleled service, would be incredibly excited about the curated range of private offerings available on our platform.

We’re actively seeking influential voices like yours to introduce Tirak’s exclusive private experiences. We envision a collaboration where you could showcase these unique offerings, creating compelling and aspirational content that resonates deeply with your followers. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, complimentary access to private experiences, affiliate commission] and provide fresh, high-value content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to explore how we can tailor this exclusive partnership? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our private partnership deck for more details.

Looking forward to a refined collaboration, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: Private & Exclusive Experiences with Tirak & [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to gently follow up on my previous email regarding a potential partnership between you and Tirak. I truly feel this collaboration presents a fantastic opportunity to further enrich your content with unique private and luxury experiences, offering immense value to your discerning audience.

Imagine showcasing private yacht charters, exclusive art gallery viewings, or bespoke historical tours through Tirak – content perfectly aligned with your brand and your followers’ desire for unparalleled experiences. Our platform is designed to provide authentic, high-end private offerings that your audience is actively seeking.

We’re eager to explore how we can tailor a partnership that best suits your content style and audience. Would you be available for a quick, discreet chat sometime this week? I’m also happy to provide more specific examples of private experiences on Tirak that we believe would be a perfect fit for your platform.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak & Private Experiences - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

This is a final follow-up regarding our invitation to partner with Tirak on showcasing unique private and exclusive experiences. We truly admire your dedication to curating exceptional content, and still believe there’s a strong synergy between your brand and our platform’s offerings.

We understand if this isn’t the right time, and there’s absolutely no pressure. However, we wanted to ensure you received our offer. Should your priorities shift or if you’re ever looking for new, exclusive content opportunities, please don’t hesitate to reach out. The door for collaboration remains open.

Sincerely, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Cinema

Initial: Subject: Action! Partner with Tirak for Unique Cinema Experiences, [Influencer Name]!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’ve been a huge fan of your insightful film reviews and engaging discussions on [specific film/genre]. Your unique perspective on cinema is truly captivating, and your audience clearly trusts your recommendations for all things film.

Tirak is a platform dedicated to connecting film lovers with unique cinema-themed experiences – from local independent film screenings and historical movie tours to film festival access and behind-the-scenes workshops. We believe your audience, who shares your passion for the silver screen, would be incredibly excited about the diverse range of cinematic offerings available on our platform.

We’re actively seeking influential voices like yours to showcase Tirak’s unparalleled cinema experiences. We envision a collaboration where you could document your experiences using Tirak, creating compelling content that deeply resonates with your followers. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, free access to events, affiliate commission] and provide fresh, engaging content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to explore how we can tailor this partnership? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our partnership deck for more details.

Companion Persona

Culture

Initial: Subject: Earn by Sharing Your Passion: Become a Tirak Cultural Companion, [Influencer Name]!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’ve been incredibly impressed by your deep knowledge and passion for [specific cultural aspect/history] showcased in your content. Your ability to bring local culture to life is truly inspiring, and your followers clearly value your expertise.

At Tirak, we empower local experts and passionate individuals like you to share their unique knowledge by offering authentic cultural experiences to travelers worldwide. Imagine guiding immersive historical tours, sharing local traditions, or hosting cultural workshops – and earning for it! We believe your expertise would make you an exceptional Tirak Companion.

We’re looking to partner with influential voices like yours to grow our community of Companions. This collaboration would involve you showcasing how easy and rewarding it is to become a Tirak Companion, inspiring your audience to turn their passions into a source of income. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, commission on sign-ups, free listing promotion] and provide fresh, engaging content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to discuss how you can start earning as a Cultural Companion? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our Companion program details.

Looking forward to connecting, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: Your Cultural Expertise as a Tirak Companion, [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to gently follow up on my previous email regarding the opportunity to become a Tirak Cultural Companion. I truly believe your unique insights into [specific cultural aspect] could be a fantastic way to earn income while enriching travelers’ experiences.

Imagine monetizing your passion by offering unique cultural walks, traditional craft workshops, or local storytelling sessions. Our platform makes it incredibly easy to set up and manage your experiences, connecting you with an eager audience of travelers seeking authentic local interactions.

We’re eager to discuss how we can support you in becoming a successful Tirak Companion. Would you be available for a quick chat sometime this week? I’m also happy to provide examples of successful cultural Companions on our platform.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak Cultural Companion Opportunity - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Initial: Subject: Guide to the Hottest Events: Become a Tirak Events Companion, [Influencer Name]!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’ve been incredibly impressed by your vibrant coverage of local events, especially your recent feature on [specific local festival/market]. Your ability to capture the energy and essence of happenings is truly fantastic, and your audience clearly trusts your recommendations for what’s on.

Tirak empowers local experts and event enthusiasts like you to share their unique knowledge by offering exciting event experiences to travelers worldwide. Imagine guiding travelers through bustling festivals, sharing insider tips for local concerts, or leading tours of unique community gatherings – and earning for it! We believe your expertise would make you an exceptional Tirak Events Companion.

We’re looking to partner with influential voices like yours to grow our community of Companions. This collaboration would involve you showcasing how easy and rewarding it is to become a Tirak Companion, inspiring your audience to turn their passions into a source of income. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, commission on sign-ups, free listing promotion] and provide fresh, engaging content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to discuss how you can start earning as an Events Companion? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our Companion program details.

Looking forward to celebrating local events together, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: Your Event Expertise as a Tirak Companion, [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to gently follow up on my previous email regarding the opportunity to become a Tirak Events Companion. I truly believe your unique insights into [specific local event type] could be a fantastic way to earn income while enriching travelers’ experiences.

Imagine monetizing your passion by offering guided tours of local art fairs, curating unique pop-up dining experiences, or providing insider access to hidden concerts. Our platform makes it incredibly easy to set up and manage your experiences, connecting you with an eager audience of travelers seeking authentic local happenings.

We’re eager to discuss how we can support you in becoming a successful Tirak Companion. Would you be available for a quick chat sometime this week? I’m also happy to provide examples of successful events Companions on our platform.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak Events Companion Opportunity - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

This is a final follow-up regarding our invitation to become a Tirak Events Companion. We truly admire your passion for uncovering the best local happenings, and still believe there’s a strong opportunity for you to share your expertise and earn through our platform.

We understand if this isn’t the right time, and there’s absolutely no pressure. However, we wanted to ensure you received our offer. Should your priorities shift or if you’re ever looking for a flexible way to monetize your event knowledge, please don’t hesitate to reach out. The door for collaboration remains open.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Food Drink

Initial: Subject: Savor & Earn: Become a Tirak Food & Drink Companion, [Influencer Name]!

Dear [Influencer Name],

I’m Tirak Team from Tirak, and I’ve been absolutely delighted by your culinary explorations, especially your recent review of [specific restaurant/dish]. Your ability to unearth hidden gems and make food come alive is truly inspiring, and your audience clearly trusts your taste!

Tirak empowers local foodies and culinary experts like you to share their unique passion by offering authentic food & drink experiences to travelers worldwide. Imagine guiding immersive street food tours, hosting bespoke cooking classes, or leading wine tastings with local producers – and earning for it! We believe your expertise would make you an exceptional Tirak Food & Drink Companion.

We’re looking to partner with influential voices like yours to grow our community of Companions. This collaboration would involve you showcasing how easy and rewarding it is to become a Tirak Companion, inspiring your audience to turn their passions into a source of income. This partnership would include [mention specific compensation/benefits, e.g., sponsored content, commission on sign-ups, free listing promotion] and provide fresh, engaging content opportunities for you.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to discuss how you can start earning as a Food & Drink Companion? Please let me know what time works best, or if you’d prefer to receive our Companion program details.

Looking forward to a delicious collaboration, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Bump: Subject: Following Up: Your Food & Drink Expertise as a Tirak Companion, [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

Just wanted to gently follow up on my previous email regarding the opportunity to become a Tirak Food & Drink Companion. I truly believe your unique insights into [specific cuisine/local eateries] could be a fantastic way to earn income while enriching travelers’ experiences.

Imagine monetizing your passion by offering guided food market tours, unique local tasting experiences, or hands-on cooking workshops. Our platform makes it incredibly easy to set up and manage your experiences, connecting you with an eager audience of travelers seeking authentic local culinary interactions.

We’re eager to discuss how we can support you in becoming a successful Tirak Companion. Would you be available for a quick chat sometime this week? I’m also happy to provide examples of successful food & drink Companions on our platform.

Best regards, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Final: Subject: Final Outreach: Tirak Food & Drink Companion Opportunity - [Influencer Name]

Dear [Influencer Name],

This is a final follow-up regarding our invitation to become a Tirak Food & Drink Companion. We truly admire your passion for culinary discovery, and still believe there’s a strong opportunity for you to share your expertise and earn through our platform.

We understand if this isn’t the right time, and there’s absolutely no pressure. However, we wanted to ensure you received our offer. Should your priorities shift or if you’re ever looking for a flexible way to monetize your food & drink knowledge, please don’t hesitate to reach out. The door for collaboration remains open.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely, Tirak Team Influencer Outreach Specialist, Tirak

Looking for materials to help grow your business on Tirak? Visit our Partner Resources page for downloadable guides, brand assets, and onboarding materials.
